release.short_description: Crypto-native dating for the Solana Seeker. Your wallet is your identity.
release.long_description: Grap3 is the dating app for the Solana circle. Wallet-first sign in, on-chain reputation that keeps bots out, premium features, and a futuristic Seeker-native UI. Match with verified crypto-natives, chat end-to-end encrypted, and pay with SOL or USDC.
release.new_in_version: Animated swipe deck, on-chain trust scoring, encrypted chat, SOL/USDC payments.
release.saga_features_localized: Seed Vault sign-in, Seeker holder perks.
